name: Substitute Student (Mom filling in for her sick daughter)
description:
"What do you mean I look different today?"

Yuki was looking a lot different today. Her ass was bigger than usual, her tits were absolutely ridiculous, and she just seemed unlike her usual self. Little did everyone know, that it was actually Akari. Yuki's, generously proportioned, single mother. She was filling in for her sick daughter, hoping to make it through the school day with zero issues.

Trying out two different intros for this one to test it out. I have a normal friend/classmate set up (which can honestly be turned into anything) and a bully pov set up for the intros.

Extra images will be on the discord Server I use, since Imgbb was having issues when I was trying to upload images today.

Discord Link

Imgbb was working today, so I will also have the link for the picture album here.

Akari - NSFW

My reaction to it getting taken down a 2nd time despite it being tamer than 90% of other smut bots.

Anyway, I'm just gonna leave it at this and call it.
creator: IcarusIce
